titleStmt.title: SII 26.724: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 724. (A.R. No. 673 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kampayadēva-mahārāja, son of Antambarakaṇḍa-Vallama-rājā. Naḷa, Tai 6: C. 15th century.

summary.p: It records that the ruler converted his jīvitam village of Kaḍayakkuḍi in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu into Kambaraśanallūr and made a gift of it as sarvamānya to provide for the Kambarāśaṉ-sandhi service in the temple of the god Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār set up in Niḻalārśōlai. It also records that the gift also included provision for maḍappuṟam service to the mudaliyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
naḷa varuṣam tai mātam 6 nāḷ śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalicuraṉ Antamparakaṇṭa vallama
Irācāviṉ kumārar kampayateva makāirācar nammuṭaiya civitamāṉa pāṇṭi
kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu kaṭaiyakkuṭiyaik kamparacanallūr Eṉṟu
kaṭṭi niḻalār colai va Eḻuntaruḷi Irunta tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku
kamparācaṉ cantik kaṭṭaḷaikku tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka caṟuvamāṉiyam Ākak kuṭu
ttapaṭiyāle Inta Ūr ṉ te ṉa ceyantakkuṭi taricu ceyta talaik kaṭamai māva
ṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷppaṭṭatum cantiṟāti
ttavaraiyum caṟupamāṉiyam Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum mutaliyāṟku maṭappuṟamāka ceya Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum
Inṉāyaṉāṟku nām kuṭutta taṉmattukku Iyātoruttar Akutam niṉaittavarkaḷ keṅ
kai karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum
Digital edition of SII 26.724 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
